name: Oracle Financial
overview_text: Oracle Financial is a cloud-based financial services platform that provides a range of banking and capital markets solution to financial institutions around the world. Oracle Financial helps financial institutions to modernize their business, manage risk more effectively, and build new business models.

description: Oracle Financial is a cloud-based financial services platform that provides a range of banking and capital markets solution to financial institutions around the world. Oracle Financial helps financial institutions to modernize their business, manage risk more effectively, and build new business models.
vision_statement: To be the most successful, customer-focused enterprise software company in the world.
mission_statement: To provide enterprise software solutions that help our customers achieve their business goals.

core_values.Innovation: We continuously innovate and improve our products and services.
core_values.Customer Focus: We put our customers at the center of everything we do.
core_values.Teamwork: We work together as a team to achieve our goals.
core_values.Integrity: We operate with integrity and ethics in all our business dealings.

sales_motion: Oracle Financial's sales motion is focused on providing personalized solutions to each customer's unique needs.

carbon_footprint: Oracle Financial has set a goal to reduce its carbon footprint by 50% by 2025.
